Recent searches confirm ongoing anti-migrant sentiment and protests in Ireland as of early May 2025. I am setting the probabilities at the minimum allowable threshold for the earliest dates and modestly increasing them for later dates in 2025, accommodating the uncertainty of a sudden extreme outlier conflict escalating in an unpredictable way during an election year or sustained civil unrest period.
